rationale: Ansari et al. (2008) is cited not only in a background list but also in the model section as a concrete prior application of the lag-decay approach the authors use. The citing paper explicitly contrasts prior dynamic individual-level studies such as Ansari et al. with its own contribution that adds competitive cross-firm direct-mail effects. The citation therefore helps both methodological setup and contribution framing, which is more than a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Ansari et al. (2008) as prior dynamic response modeling work and extends that line by introducing competitive direct-mail interactions in a charitable context. It also follows a similar Koyck-style treatment of carryover with unequally spaced events.
